name: Generate Revenue
description: Generate Revenue with Content Skills

name: One Click Onboard
description:
1. Make Pink Sheet online (Move from Share Drive excel to an excel looking App)
2. Call Image Generation in Batch and take it to approve stage
3. Retry or Accept Image
4. Push to Insert 
5. Approve by Admin
6. Push it Live and sync with Algolia

name: Chef Scrum Manager
description:
1. Currently chef assignment and task entries happen manually over excel.
2. Create a pipeline where chef onboarding requests from the App and the current chef leads data are unified into one central data base
3. Project and task management should happen over this underlying data
4. Everyday task updates should happen automatically and alerts happen when status change.

name: Delivery Booking MCP
description:
1. In the absence of Porter APIs, we need to orchestrate a MCP booking capabilities with Porter and Rapido and automate booking.
2. Once we see it working, we need to fuse this as part of "Book Now" capabilities in our delivery management dashboard.
3. Core Capabilities: Book Rides | Update Status | Track | Cancel | Rebook

name: Onboarding Performance Dashboard
description:
Build an interactive dashboard where we can see chef onboarding progress MoM. Be able to: (1) See Health board. Chefs Active/InActive/Retired. Time to Onboard.
(2) No of chefs onboarded MoM by Team Members. 
(3) Goal Tracker

name: Logistics Performance Dashboard
description:
Build an interactive dashboard where we surface:
1. Total Deliveries per day, per month
2. Cost Per Delivery
3. Delivery Kms
4. Delivery Time

name: Smart Swapper
description: When a chef rejects an order or dont accept within 20 mins, then automatically ping the chefs nearer to customer within 5 kms radius to see if they will accept it. If they accept it, then the order gets transferred in the database.

name: Auto Credit for Cancellation
description: When an order that is not picked-up yet needs to be cancelled, the system automatically process refund with PhonePe and intimates customers

name: Auto Cancel Instant Order
description: Auto Cancel Instant Order is the chef has not accepted or the team hasnt swapped within 30 mins. Send notifications to customers.

name: Free Sampler
description: Build an automated system that allows the onboarding team to figure out who is the best customer to receive Food Sample. This should be based on Customer LTV and proximity to Chef. Once the team approves the customer, an order has to be generated as Sample order and arrive at delivery dashboard. The chef should not be paid as it Sample and the chef wont exist in the chef database but temp table here with only bare minimum information

name: Revamp Delivery Tracker
description:
After the Delivery MCP is complete, redesign the delivery tracker. The new tracker UI should :
(1) Show status for all orders 
(2) Book or Cancel or Re-Book Deliveries
(3) Escalate to Porter support group on exceptions and Keep track of all escalations and their resolution status which can be updated.
(4) Have a continuous monitoring system where if there is any deviation from the route, the team gets notified as alrerts.
(5) Trigger Alerts on the web App and also whatsapp for exception scenarios: Not picked still after 30 mins of Pickup time, Not delivered still after 1 hour of pickup.

name: Stream Delivery Notifications to Customers
description: When an exception happens (delay), please message customer via Notifications, Whatsapp and Email that the order is delayed and it will be delivered by X minutes.

name: Bulk Cancellation and Customer Message
description: Create a bulk cancellation option (Password protecteD) and affirmation steps where the delivery team can select all orders and cancel with a customized message. Customers should get notified via Notifications, Email and WhatsApp. Chef should get a message that it wont be picked up but they will be compensated. The order status should be set to a new state called "UnableToFulfil"

name: Chatbot for Customers
description:
Build a Chatbot thats always available on customer app that customer can chat with to
(1) know their order status. In this case, check with the internal delivery tracker status and update.
(2) for any other queries , it should send a whatsapp message to our Bhookle operations number and our team will connect.

name: Redo Admin Dashboard
description:
1. Transform the current dashboard to a slick looking one and create new visualization.
2. Perform analysis and commentary on each metrics
3. Summarize the overall health of company
4. Generate MIS report 
5. Auto Email Comprehensive PDF on Company report to me EOM.

name: User Behavior Analysis
description:
1. Digest data we have internally around Behavior Analysis
2. Perform page wise funnel analysis on them.
3. Build commentary on this and provide recommendations

name: Unified User Analysis Dashboard
description:
1. Digest data from behavior table and order table and fuse them.
2. Perform cohort analysis on the unified data
3. Run Commentary and Recommendations

name: Revamp Bhookle App
description:
1. Use Claude Design to generate New UX
2. Ideate with new set of App features 
3. Revise discovery strategy

name: Build a customized offer
description: Based on a certain defined criteria, generate and send a personalized offer to customers for WINBACK. The offer should be sent to Customer WhatsApp and Email.

name: Build a Private Financial Dashboard
description: Build a focused financial health dashboard that takes in order data and provide financial metrics (GOV, AOV, Net Revenue, Net Profit, ARR etc) and provide summary

name: B2B Leads & Reach Automation
description:
1. Generate a lead pipeline for B2B Corporates
2. Automate reach out via Email and LinkedIn
3. Automate follow ups.

name: Auto FSSAI Checker
description:
1. Read Chefs FSSAI and if expired, automate renewal nudges to them via Chef App and also WhatsApp.
2. Build a switch where we can turn off such chefs (On/Off)

name: Redo & Automate Pitch book
description:
1. Redo the Pitchbook
2. Automate data fetches and populate the metrics in PitchBook

name: Automate Investor ReachOut
description:
1. Identify potential investors
2. Scramble and get Human leads (email, Linkedin) via web crawling
3. Build customized message for every investor and attach Pitchbook
4. Reach out via Email and LinkedIn
5. Follow up back on certain schedule automatically
6. Update Investor out reach status and feedback if any.

name: A Financial Coach
description:
1. It should help me get educated on basic financial terminologies
2. It should look into my data and tell me those numbers

name: Pitch Evaluator
description: 1.Role-play with AI as Investors and build a chatbot that asks me questions and evaluate and give feedback on my response and rate me on scale of 10.

name: Automate B2B Dashboard
description:
1. Automate Invoice generation for SUKI
2. Import existing B2B Financial Ledger and transform to a table 
3. Perform Delivery Update and send Reminder
4. Show me Metrics

name: Redo Subscription Management
description:
Take the subscription management portal and enhance it.
1. Customers need to be notified automatically when subscription is about to expire
2. Customer can cancel their subscription from the App 
3. Customer can pause and resume their subscription
4. Customer can chat with our team to communicate exceptions

name: Automate and Build Subsription Dashboard
description:
Redesign dashboard.
Fuse Payment information.

name: Manage SMM
description:
1. Generate 30 days content plan for SMM for Bhookle Eats (50% Chef Videos and 50% Generative)
2. Take the script and automate reel videos and keep it ready for approvals
3. Provide me way to approve, retry and reject videos
4. Take the exisisting chef videos from the drive folder and keep it in schedule. Before Posting it should check if the chef is InActive and post only Active

name: Respond to SMM Messages
description: Listen to messages and reply automatically

name: Manage Meta Ads
description:
Connect to Meta Ads:
1. Critique the creatives, ad setup and suggest me new strategies
2. Give me performance summary and recommendations and automate it
3. Manage budget and spending

name: Generate Marketing Strategy
description:
1. Connect to Meta and SMM
2. Review, Critique and recommend for Marketing Strategy

name: Automate Email Campaigns
description:
1. Classify customers based on LTV, Churn etc
2. Connect with SendGrid and create campaigns
3. Monitor Results

name: Build LinkedIn Presence and Automate Content
description:
1. Generate LinkedIn Content for 30 days
2. Automate Posting
3. Have a way to measure performance

name: Build a referral feature on the App
description: Users can refer their friends and family and get x% discount on their orders (one time) via uniquely generated coupon code

name: Automate Push Notifications
description: Generate and Automate Push Notifications.

name: Strategize a Franchise model
description: 1. Research and come up with a plan to franchise Bhookle to new cities

name: Compete Bot
description:
1. Build a bot that scans competitor products
2. Does Research on them
3. Position Bhookle vs Compete
4. Scan the compete SMM and ad strategy and do commentary and recommendation

name: Set up AI for Bhookle Enterprise
description:
1. Feed the Database POSTGRES and context to Claude
2. Feed the Entire Code Base to GitHub and connect Claude to GitHub
3. Author entire Architecture, Narration of product, pages to Claude as Knowledge base to Projects
4. Create a nomenclature of projects for each Bhookle Entity
5. Execute a simple dashboard

name: Automate App Testing
description: Make Claude completely do end to end testing for Bhookle App and Bhookle Chef App and send testing summary.

name: Log Sniffer
description: Keep everyday check on logs and trigger alerts on errors and warnings

name: Improve Store Ratings
description: After the food being rated good, I would like a message sent to customer on whatsapp and email where they rate us on their Appstore or Playstore

name: Benchmark performance and Improve
description:
1. Get the Firebase load times and Backend Database.
2. Bench mark load times
3. Find bottlenecks
4. Ask Claude to Improvise

name: Rework Bhookle.com Web Front
description:
1. Rework the landing page
2. Find a way to transition from Ionic to New Stack
3. Repurpose App to Web Transform
